description: Intelligent navigation force field that guides bodies toward targets with arrival behavior

arrival_radius.description: Radius at which arrival behavior begins (slowing down)

max_speed.description: Maximum speed the body can achieve

arrival_slowdown.description: Distance over which to slow down completely

behavior.seek: When outside arrival radius, full speed toward target
behavior.arrival: When inside arrival radius, slow down proportionally
behavior.stopping: Stop when within 0.01 units of target

examples.name: Navigate to link
examples.description: When user clicks a link, apply navigation force to move viewport toward it

examples.name: Return to origin
examples.description: Home button applies navigation force back to origin

examples.name: Smooth transition
examples.description: Gentle navigation with large slowdown zone
